page: Vultr voc-c-8c-16gb-300s-amd is an Optimized Cloud Compute server powered by an AMD EPYC processor using the x86_64 architecture. It features 8 vCPUs mapped to 4 physical cores with 2 threads per core under a shared CPU allocation model. The system is equipped with 16.0 GB of system memory, providing 2.0 GB of RAM per core, and includes 300 GB of bundled local NVMe SSD storage.

In benchmark evaluations, the server demonstrates top-tier single-core CPU performance, scoring 3213.28 in stress-ng single-core tests, placing it in the top 10%. Multi-core CPU performance is average, with a stress-ng multi-core score of 25653.07 and a PassMark CPU score of 19815.41. Memory bandwidth is moderate, registering 118.62 GB/sec for large-block read operations and 68.98 GB/sec for write operations. Single-threaded gzip compression is strong at 30.38 GB/sec, while LLM inference tasks show average performance for small models but drop to weak levels for prompt processing on medium 7B models.

Given its shared CPU allocation, this server offers a cost-effective entry point for compute-heavy workloads that do not require dedicated CPU cores. The 1:2 vCPU-to-RAM ratio and bundled 300 GB NVMe SSD make it highly suitable for web serving, database operations, and moderate multi-threaded processing. However, the shared CPU model presents a performance tradeoff under sustained, continuous maximum loads. It is best suited for static web serving, Redis caching, and general-purpose utility workloads.
description: Vultr voc-c-8c-16gb-300s-amd is an Optimized Cloud Compute server featuring 8 shared AMD EPYC vCPUs (4 physical cores), 16.0 GB of RAM, and 300 GB of bundled NVMe SSD storage. Operating on the x86_64 architecture, this server delivers top-tier single-core CPU performance alongside average multi-core and memory bandwidth capabilities. It is well-suited for cost-effective web serving, database operations, and general-purpose workloads that benefit from fast local storage but do not require dedicated CPU cores.
og_description: Vultr voc-c-8c-16gb-300s-amd is an Optimized Cloud Compute server with 8 shared AMD EPYC vCPUs, 16 GB RAM, and 300 GB NVMe SSD storage, offering strong single-core performance for web serving and databases.
meta_description: Vultr voc-c-8c-16gb-300s-amd features 8 shared AMD EPYC vCPUs, 16 GB RAM, and 300 GB NVMe SSD storage for balanced, budget-friendly compute workloads.
tagline: An AMD EPYC-powered compute instance featuring shared vCPUs, fast NVMe storage, and strong single-core processing capabilities.

16.0 GB system memory and 300 GB bundled NVMe SSD storage
Top-tier single-core CPU performance in stress-ng benchmarks
